TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bangcalay a tatayna atu l'causay a aadupan (kamu nu Hulam: ÁĺéŚ•≥ŤąáťáéÁćł) kakungkuan a kawaw . yumahida sa, idaw ku mabataday nu kanatal idaw ku cacaya a talahaday mabawbaway ku balucu makatalay a Ya-tan wan-ce . idaw ku cacayay a demiad salabi sa maudad tabaki ku bali, idaw ku cacaya a micidekay ku la'cus a babalaki tayni itniyi i cen-paw , mangalay tuna nikapetan tu bangcalay a sicekaay a balu mangalay miliyun tu sapilabinaw ci wan-ceanan, nika ci wan-ce macikien la'cusen cinidaan bahbah han ni wance kiya babalaki, edep hantu nida ku pana', ya la'cusay a babalaki alaw masumad mala bangcalay a sian-niw . . ci sian-niw hantu mangalay mibakin tina talahaday a wan-ce mala lacusay a mapaydangay a aadupan, cen-paw nu tademaw mala sakaudip nu cancanan atu tatakalan, pabali han nida tu dadingu' atu caaya ka cebal nu sicekaay a balu sipabeli ci wan-cean. idasa ci wan-ce i sadikuday nu nikapecaan nu balu amahetik sa amatineng tunu tademawan, satimaan han ala amalawpes, anunayi ku sakalawpes, nika udip nida hidasatu malapaydangay nu aadupan. Be-el , cacaysa itida i Fa-kuo nu adidi'ay a niyadu manamuh mibelihay tu cudad a limucedan, sisa ci Be-el hina libut tina niyaduan caaya kasumad kuni kaudipan, mangalay pasayda i cudad mikilim tu balihenaway a sakaudip. mikihida tu niyaduay a limuceda, hinacudaday icudad ci Be-el kaisa ku katuuday milihida cinidaan, caay katapa ku mapelukay a cacabayan. wama ni Be-el ci Mu-wey-se (Mo-wey-se, ŤéęÁ∂≠śĖĮ) u sitangahay matinengay mikinkiw tu cancanan a kawawan, sawni mikinkiw tu cancanan caay ka laheci kuni kinkiwan tu tuud katawantu nu niyaduay a tademaw u maapaay han cinida. mangalay cinida milihida tu sapisetset tuni kinkiw nida tu tiyun hannanay malineng tu ku sapiletek tu kasuy a kikayan, alaen nida ku nikinkiwan tu masangaay malingad tayda i sakasetsetan a dadan mungangaw ku culil, manglay cinida miliyas tuni lalabaan nu kuyu a wacu pacebasatu micumud i cenpaw micaliw milabin. ci l'causay a aadupan maadih nida ku caaya kaw kaka tinengan a tademaw micumud mapatay nu linges, pulul hantu nida ci Mu-wey-se (Mo-wey-se, ŤéęÁ∂≠śĖĮ) i papululan. ŚźĆśôāŚä†śĖĮť†ď(Gaston)ŚíĆšĺÜŚĮĆ(Lefou), . tawya ci Ka-se-tun (Gaston, Śä†śĖĮť†ď) atu ci Lefou , kanamuhan nu niyaduay a tademaw, pabalucu pasayda i niyaduay u sabangcalay a limucedan ci Be-el mikikun kitasa. kaiyan ni Be-el ku ngalay sananay a tademaw, tabaki masatatama'ay ci Ka-se-tun (Gaston, Śä†śĖĮť†ď). maadih ni Be-el ci subayu‚ÄĒFi-li-pe sacacay sa taluma caay nayi maadih nida ku wama, kacaw satu cinida ci Fi-li-pe pasayda i cen-paw mikilim. mangalay miala ci Be-el ci yamaan nida hidasatu milabin. tawya a labii miyukiw ci paydangan a aadupan ci Be-el an mapulung kita malabisa, kaiyan ni Be-el , ci paydangan a aadupan mapatay nu linges, sakamusa i katuuday amana' pakani ku katuuday tu cancanan. (Lumiere),śôāťźėÔľćŤĎõŚ£ęŤŹĮ(Cogsworth),ŤĆ∂Ś£ļÔľćŤĆ∂ÁÖ≤Ś§™Ś§™(Mrs. Potts) . teban nulabii mapateluh ci Be-el taydan nina i paladah mikilim tu kakanen, amica kunipihapu ni paydangan a aadupan tu nakamuan, nika aenengan nu lacik ‚ÄĒ Lu-mi-er (Lumiere ÁõßÁĪ≥šļě), tuki ‚Äď Ke-se-hwa (Cogsworth ŤĎõŚ£ęŤŹĮ), tiwi ‚Äď O-cia bai (Mrs. Potts ŤĆ∂ÁÖ≤Ś§™Ś§ß), atu kupu ‚ÄĒ A-ci , manamuh tu kataydaan nida mapalaw ku katuuday paadih tui takalay a kakanen cinidaan. katuuday a tademaw mangalay papilabin ci Be-el mangalay papilawpes tu tatimaan. namamin satu namalabi ci Lumiere atu ci Cogsworth ladayen nuheni ci Be-el miadih tu cenpaw, hina paawpaaway ci Be-el litawalan nida kiya tatusay haymaw hannida micumud miubiy taydan nida i pabaw mibuhat tu kakabian. kalapecipecian kiya kakabian u kakabian ni paydangan a aadupan, ci paydangan a aadupan makaadih tuni cumudan ni Be-el mapatay nu linges bahbahantu nida ci Be-el . matawid ci Be-el caay pakahemhem tunabalucuan ci paydangan a aadupan tu ni kaynah, kanahatu u teban nulabii, kacawan nida ku subayu ci Fi-li-pe milaliw. idadan henay lalabaen nu kuyu a wacu, kakalahan satu ci paydangan a aadupan katukuh sa bahbahen nida kiya kuyu a wacu namim, nika ci paydangan a aadupan hida satu maduka mabulilah, ahican tu kiya haw pataluma' hantu ni Be-el i cenpaw lihida satu mikukay ci paydangan a aadupan. ci Mo-wey-se taluma' satu i niyadu' pasayda ci Gaston miawaw pakaudipen kakusa, nika inai ku palutatengaay ci Mo-wey-se nakamuan a paydangan a aadupan, micili cinidaan u maapaay kisu han ba'ba'hen naca cinida i kakanen. paydangan a aadupan maduka satu sadimelen ni Be-el amidiput, maadih cinida tuni kacaay ka lipahak ni Be-el ngalay saca mangalay mipadang tuci Be-el an aw hica ku papadangan numaku sa, pabali hantu nida tu cenpaw aadihan tu cuda ci Be-el mala sinubu nida. sademiad sa kunuheni maladay, paydangan a aadupan hamaw satu masumad ku balucu, ci Be-el makaadih tunika sumadan ni paydangan a aadupan tu kapah hamaw satu manamuh cinidaan. lipahak namim namapalaw, paydangan a aadupan palita hanida ci Be-el kiya makenud ku bihid numisu han, sakamusatu ci Be-el mabulah kaku ci amaan numaku, paydangan a aadupan pacaliw hantu nida ci Be-el tu dadingu, ci Be-el i dadingu maka makaadih tui dadinguay a babalaki ci amaaku mabulilah tuni kataynian tuni kangalayan miala i takuwanay aidadan. manamuhay ci Be-el an a paydangan a aadupan caay kalesen makaadih tuni ka lalum ni Be-el , pabalucu satu pakalihalay, lalitumuh satu kunuheni maluwama, sipabeli hantu nida ku dadingu cinidaan. i cenpaway a katuuday a tademaw kaisa makaadih tu pahedekan amalalum. . tawya ci Gaston mangalay makaala ci Be-el an, cakayan nida ku maapaay a sakakaay, palulen nida ci Mo-wey-se u maapaay han a ngangan ku sapulul cinidaan , patalawan nida ci Be-el mangalay pakasi acawa cinidaan. pacudaden nida tuni kacaay kaapa ni ama aku, pacudaden nida tu tatengaay kawaw, ci Be-el patahekalen nida ku dadingu paadih ci paydangan a aadupan tu tatengay nu nabalucuan nida pakatineng tu katuuday a palutatengan. ci Gaston makaadih ci Be-el an miadih ci paydangan a aadupan tu wayway nida sasa mainapsa, sakamuen nida ku katuuday a tademaw tuci paydangan a aadupan a sapakatalawan, miwuywuy tu niyaduay a tademaw atayda mipatay ci paydangan a aadupan, pululen nida ci Be-el atu ci Mo-wey-se tangeden i sasa nu luma'. ci O-cia bai a wawa nida ci A-ci hamawsa micumud i tisagi ni Be-el makatukuh i luma' ni Be-el , maadih nida ku kawaw namakayda miala cinida tu sakalihalay nu dinki a sapiletek tu kasuy a kikay sa mapatahekal ci Be-el . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan

¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ . matawid ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ ¶aaj pakańß…ômńß…ôm tunabar~…ĺu ¶uan ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu ni kajnańß, kanańßatu u t…ôban nur~…ĺabii, ka ¶awan nida ku subaju ¶i fi-r~…ĺi-p…ô mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw. gaston miawaw pakaudip…ôn kakusa, nika inai ku par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô nakamuan a pajdaŇčan a aadupan, mi ¶ir~…ĺi ¶inidaan u maapaaj kisu ńßan ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °ńß…ôn na ¶a ¶inida i kakan…ôn. pajdaŇčan a aadupan maduka satu sadim…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ amidiput, maadińß ¶inida tuni ka ¶aaj ka r~…ĺipańßak ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ Ňčar~…ĺaj sa ¶a maŇčar~…ĺaj mipadaŇč tu ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an aw ńßi ¶a ku papadaŇčan numaku sa, pabar~…ĺi ńßantu nida tu ¶…ônpaw aadińßan tu ¶uda ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sinubu nida. sad…ômiad sa kunuńß…ôni mar~…ĺadaj, pajdaŇčan a aadupan ńßamaw satu masumad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u, ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ makaadińß tunika sumadan ni pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu kapańß ńßamaw satu manamuńß ¶inidaan. r~…ĺipańßak namim namapar~…ĺaw, pajdaŇčan a aadupan par~…ĺita ńßanida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ kija mak…ônud ku bińßid numisu ńßan, sakamusatu ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ mabur~…ĺańß kaku ¶i amaan numaku, pajdaŇčan a aadupan pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ńßantu nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ tu dadiŇču, ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ i dadiŇču maka makaadińß tui dadiŇčuaj a babar~…ĺaki ¶i amaaku mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß tuni katajnian tuni kaŇčar~…ĺajan miar~…ĺa i takuwanaj aidadan. manamuńßaj ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an a pajdaŇčan a aadupan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn makaadińß tuni ka r~…ĺar~…ĺum ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ , pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu pakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺitumuńß satu kunuńß…ôni mar~…ĺuwama, sipab…ôr~…ĺi ńßantu nida ku dadiŇču ¶inidaan. i ¶…ônpawaj a katuudaj a tad…ômaw kaisa makaadińß tu pańß…ôd…ôkan amar~…ĺar~…ĺum. . tawja ¶i gaston maŇčar~…ĺaj makaar~…ĺa ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an, ¶akajan nida ku maapaaj a sakakaaj, par~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô u maapaaj ńßan a ŇčaŇčan ku sapur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶inidaan , patar~…ĺawan nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ maŇčar~…ĺaj pakasi a ¶awa ¶inidaan. pa ¶udad…ôn nida tuni ka ¶aaj kaapa ni ama aku, pa ¶udad…ôn nida tu tat…ôŇčaaj kawaw, ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku dadiŇču paadińß ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu tat…ôŇčaj nu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nida pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj a par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan. ¶i gaston makaadińß ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an miadińß ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu wajwaj nida sasa mainapsa, sakamu…ôn nida ku katuudaj a tad…ômaw tu ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan a sapakatar~…ĺawan, miwujwuj tu nijaduaj a tad…ômaw atajda mipataj ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ atu ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô taŇč…ôd…ôn i sasa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ¶i o- ¶ia bai a wawa nida ¶i a- ¶i ńßamawsa mi ¶umud i tisagi ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ makatukuńß i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ , maadińß nida ku kawaw namakajda miar~…ĺa ¶inida tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu dinki a sapir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk tu kasuj a kikaj sa mapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: bangcalay a tatayna atu l'causay a aadupan (kamu nu Hulam: ÁĺéŚ•≥ŤąáťáéÁćł) kakungkuan a kawaw . yumahida sa, idaw ku mabataday nu kanatal idaw ku cacaya a talahaday mabawbaway ku balucu makatalay a Ya-tan wan-ce . idaw ku cacayay a demiad salabi sa maudad tabaki ku bali, idaw ku cacaya a micidekay ku la'cus a babalaki tayni itniyi i cen-paw , mangalay tuna nikapetan tu bangcalay a sicekaay a balu mangalay miliyun tu sapilabinaw ci wan-ceanan, nika ci wan-ce macikien la'cusen cinidaan bahbah han ni wance kiya babalaki, edep hantu nida ku pana', ya la'cusay a babalaki alaw masumad mala bangcalay a sian-niw . . ci sian-niw hantu mangalay mibakin tina talahaday a wan-ce mala lacusay a mapaydangay a aadupan, cen-paw nu tademaw mala sakaudip nu cancanan atu tatakalan, pabali han nida tu dadingu' atu caaya ka cebal nu sicekaay a balu sipabeli ci wan-cean. idasa ci wan-ce i sadikuday nu nikapecaan nu balu amahetik sa amatineng tunu tademawan, satimaan han ala amalawpes, anunayi ku sakalawpes, nika udip nida hidasatu malapaydangay nu aadupan. Be-el , cacaysa itida i Fa-kuo nu adidi'ay a niyadu manamuh mibelihay tu cudad a limucedan, sisa ci Be-el hina libut tina niyaduan caaya kasumad kuni kaudipan, mangalay pasayda i cudad mikilim tu balihenaway a sakaudip. mikihida tu niyaduay a limuceda, hinacudaday icudad ci Be-el kaisa ku katuuday milihida cinidaan, caay katapa ku mapelukay a cacabayan. wama ni Be-el ci Mu-wey-se (Mo-wey-se, ŤéęÁ∂≠śĖĮ) u sitangahay matinengay mikinkiw tu cancanan a kawawan, sawni mikinkiw tu cancanan caay ka laheci kuni kinkiwan tu tuud katawantu nu niyaduay a tademaw u maapaay han cinida. mangalay cinida milihida tu sapisetset tuni kinkiw nida tu tiyun hannanay malineng tu ku sapiletek tu kasuy a kikayan, alaen nida ku nikinkiwan tu masangaay malingad tayda i sakasetsetan a dadan mungangaw ku culil, manglay cinida miliyas tuni lalabaan nu kuyu a wacu pacebasatu micumud i cenpaw micaliw milabin. ci l'causay a aadupan maadih nida ku caaya kaw kaka tinengan a tademaw micumud mapatay nu linges, pulul hantu nida ci Mu-wey-se (Mo-wey-se, ŤéęÁ∂≠śĖĮ) i papululan. ŚźĆśôāŚä†śĖĮť†ď(Gaston)ŚíĆšĺÜŚĮĆ(Lefou), . tawya ci Ka-se-tun (Gaston, Śä†śĖĮť†ď) atu ci Lefou , kanamuhan nu niyaduay a tademaw, pabalucu pasayda i niyaduay u sabangcalay a limucedan ci Be-el mikikun kitasa. kaiyan ni Be-el ku ngalay sananay a tademaw, tabaki masatatama'ay ci Ka-se-tun (Gaston, Śä†śĖĮť†ď). maadih ni Be-el ci subayu‚ÄĒFi-li-pe sacacay sa taluma caay nayi maadih nida ku wama, kacaw satu cinida ci Fi-li-pe pasayda i cen-paw mikilim. mangalay miala ci Be-el ci yamaan nida hidasatu milabin. tawya a labii miyukiw ci paydangan a aadupan ci Be-el an mapulung kita malabisa, kaiyan ni Be-el , ci paydangan a aadupan mapatay nu linges, sakamusa i katuuday amana' pakani ku katuuday tu cancanan. (Lumiere),śôāťźėÔľćŤĎõŚ£ęŤŹĮ(Cogsworth),ŤĆ∂Ś£ļÔľćŤĆ∂ÁÖ≤Ś§™Ś§™(Mrs. Potts) . teban nulabii mapateluh ci Be-el taydan nina i paladah mikilim tu kakanen, amica kunipihapu ni paydangan a aadupan tu nakamuan, nika aenengan nu lacik ‚ÄĒ Lu-mi-er (Lumiere ÁõßÁĪ≥šļě), tuki ‚Äď Ke-se-hwa (Cogsworth ŤĎõŚ£ęŤŹĮ), tiwi ‚Äď O-cia bai (Mrs. Potts ŤĆ∂ÁÖ≤Ś§™Ś§ß), atu kupu ‚ÄĒ A-ci , manamuh tu kataydaan nida mapalaw ku katuuday paadih tui takalay a kakanen cinidaan. katuuday a tademaw mangalay papilabin ci Be-el mangalay papilawpes tu tatimaan. namamin satu namalabi ci Lumiere atu ci Cogsworth ladayen nuheni ci Be-el miadih tu cenpaw, hina paawpaaway ci Be-el litawalan nida kiya tatusay haymaw hannida micumud miubiy taydan nida i pabaw mibuhat tu kakabian. kalapecipecian kiya kakabian u kakabian ni paydangan a aadupan, ci paydangan a aadupan makaadih tuni cumudan ni Be-el mapatay nu linges bahbahantu nida ci Be-el . matawid ci Be-el caay pakahemhem tunabalucuan ci paydangan a aadupan tu ni kaynah, kanahatu u teban nulabii, kacawan nida ku subayu ci Fi-li-pe milaliw. idadan henay lalabaen nu kuyu a wacu, kakalahan satu ci paydangan a aadupan katukuh sa bahbahen nida kiya kuyu a wacu namim, nika ci paydangan a aadupan hida satu maduka mabulilah, ahican tu kiya haw pataluma' hantu ni Be-el i cenpaw lihida satu mikukay ci paydangan a aadupan. ci Mo-wey-se taluma' satu i niyadu' pasayda ci Gaston miawaw pakaudipen kakusa, nika inai ku palutatengaay ci Mo-wey-se nakamuan a paydangan a aadupan, micili cinidaan u maapaay kisu han ba'ba'hen naca cinida i kakanen. paydangan a aadupan maduka satu sadimelen ni Be-el amidiput, maadih cinida tuni kacaay ka lipahak ni Be-el ngalay saca mangalay mipadang tuci Be-el an aw hica ku papadangan numaku sa, pabali hantu nida tu cenpaw aadihan tu cuda ci Be-el mala sinubu nida. sademiad sa kunuheni maladay, paydangan a aadupan hamaw satu masumad ku balucu, ci Be-el makaadih tunika sumadan ni paydangan a aadupan tu kapah hamaw satu manamuh cinidaan. lipahak namim namapalaw, paydangan a aadupan palita hanida ci Be-el kiya makenud ku bihid numisu han, sakamusatu ci Be-el mabulah kaku ci amaan numaku, paydangan a aadupan pacaliw hantu nida ci Be-el tu dadingu, ci Be-el i dadingu maka makaadih tui dadinguay a babalaki ci amaaku mabulilah tuni kataynian tuni kangalayan miala i takuwanay aidadan. manamuhay ci Be-el an a paydangan a aadupan caay kalesen makaadih tuni ka lalum ni Be-el , pabalucu satu pakalihalay, lalitumuh satu kunuheni maluwama, sipabeli hantu nida ku dadingu cinidaan. i cenpaway a katuuday a tademaw kaisa makaadih tu pahedekan amalalum. . tawya ci Gaston mangalay makaala ci Be-el an, cakayan nida ku maapaay a sakakaay, palulen nida ci Mo-wey-se u maapaay han a ngangan ku sapulul cinidaan , patalawan nida ci Be-el mangalay pakasi acawa cinidaan. pacudaden nida tuni kacaay kaapa ni ama aku, pacudaden nida tu tatengaay kawaw, ci Be-el patahekalen nida ku dadingu paadih ci paydangan a aadupan tu tatengay nu nabalucuan nida pakatineng tu katuuday a palutatengan. ci Gaston makaadih ci Be-el an miadih ci paydangan a aadupan tu wayway nida sasa mainapsa, sakamuen nida ku katuuday a tademaw tuci paydangan a aadupan a sapakatalawan, miwuywuy tu niyaduay a tademaw atayda mipatay ci paydangan a aadupan, pululen nida ci Be-el atu ci Mo-wey-se tangeden i sasa nu luma'. ci O-cia bai a wawa nida ci A-ci hamawsa micumud i tisagi ni Be-el makatukuh i luma' ni Be-el , maadih nida ku kawaw namakayda miala cinida tu sakalihalay nu dinki a sapiletek tu kasuy a kikay sa mapatahekal ci Be-el . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a tatajna atu r~…ĺ Ē~ ° ¶ausaj a aadupan (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *****) kakuŇčkuan a kawaw . jumańßida sa, idaw ku mabatadaj nu kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a tar~…ĺańßadaj mabawbawaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u makatar~…ĺaj a ja-tan wan- ¶…ô . idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a d…ômiad sar~…ĺabi sa maudad tabaki ku bar~…ĺi, idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a mi ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us a babar~…ĺaki tajni itniji i ¶…ôn-paw , maŇčar~…ĺaj tuna nikap…ôtan tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a si ¶…ôkaaj a bar~…ĺu maŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺijun tu sapir~…ĺabinaw ¶i wan- ¶…ôanan, nika ¶i wan- ¶…ô ma ¶iki…ôn r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us…ôn ¶inidaan bańßbańß ńßan ni wan ¶…ô kija babar~…ĺaki, …ôd…ôp ńßantu nida ku pana Ē~ °, ja r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a babar~…ĺaki ar~…ĺaw masumad mar~…ĺa baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a sian-niw . . ¶i sian-niw ńßantu maŇčar~…ĺaj mibakin tina ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ . matawid ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ ¶aaj pakańß…ômńß…ôm tunabar~…ĺu ¶uan ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu ni kajnańß, kanańßatu u t…ôban nur~…ĺabii, ka ¶awan nida ku subaju ¶i fi-r~…ĺi-p…ô mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw. mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß, ańßi ¶an tu kija ńßaw patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßantu ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ i ¶…ônpaw r~…ĺińßida satu mikukaj ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan. ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu i nijadu Ē~ ° pasajda ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan maduka satu sadim…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ amidiput, maadińß ¶inida tuni ka ¶aaj ka r~…ĺipańßak ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ Ňčar~…ĺaj sa ¶a maŇčar~…ĺaj mipadaŇč tu ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an aw ńßi ¶a ku papadaŇčan numaku sa, pabar~…ĺi ńßantu nida tu ¶…ônpaw aadińßan tu ¶uda ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sinubu nida. sad…ômiad sa kunuńß…ôni mar~…ĺadaj, pajdaŇčan a aadupan ńßamaw satu masumad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u, ¶i bińßid numisu ńßan, sakamusatu ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ mabur~…ĺańß kaku ¶i amaan numaku, pajdaŇčan a aadupan pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ńßantu nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ tu dadiŇču, ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ i dadiŇču maka makaadińß tui r~…ĺar~…ĺum ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ , pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu pakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺitumuńß satu kunuńß…ôni mar~…ĺuwama, sipab…ôr~…ĺi ńßantu nida ku dadiŇču ¶inidaan. i ¶…ônpawaj a katuudaj a tad…ômaw kaisa makaadińß tu pańß…ôd…ôkan amar~…ĺar~…ĺum. . tawja ¶i gaston maŇčar~…ĺaj makaar~…ĺa ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an, ¶akajan nida ku maapaaj a sakakaaj, par~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô u maapaaj ńßan a ŇčaŇčan ku sapur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶inidaan , patar~…ĺawan nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ maŇčar~…ĺaj pakasi a ¶awa ¶inidaan. pa ¶udad…ôn nida tuni ka ¶aaj kaapa ni ama aku, pa ¶udad…ôn nida tu tat…ôŇčaaj kawaw, ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku dadiŇču paadińß ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu tat…ôŇčaj nu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nida pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj a par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan. ¶i gaston makaadińß ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ an miadińß ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan tu wajwaj nida sasa mainapsa, sakamu…ôn nida ku katuudaj a tad…ômaw tu ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan a sapakatar~…ĺawan, miwujwuj tu nijaduaj a tad…ômaw atajda mipataj ¶i pajdaŇčan a aadupan, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ atu ¶i mo-w…ô-s…ô taŇč…ôd…ôn i sasa nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ¶i o- ¶ia bai a wawa nida ¶i a- ¶i ńßamawsa mi ¶umud i tisagi ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ makatukuńß i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ , maadińß nida ku kawaw namakajda miar~…ĺa ¶inida tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu dinki a sapir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk tu kasuj a kikaj sa mapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶i b…ô-…ôr~…ĺ . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
